2026-0351
2026-04-21CIRCFirst Nations Fiscal and Statistical Management ActAppointment of the Deputy Chief Commissioner of the First Nations Tax CommissionAppointment of William McCue of Georgina Island, Ontario, to be Deputy Chief Commissioner of the First Nations Tax Commission, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective June 7, 2026.N/A
act: First Nations Fiscal and Statistical Management Act
subject: Appointment of the Deputy Chief Commissioner of the First Nations Tax Commission
precis: Appointment of William McCue of Georgina Island, Ontario, to be Deputy Chief Commissioner of the First Nations Tax Commission, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective June 7, 2026.
